sentences.arabic: قَدَّمَتِ الضَّيْفَةُ لِلْعَائِلَةِ حَلَوِيَّاتٍ مِنْ بَلَدِهَا.
sentences.translation: Gošća je porodici ponudila slatkiše iz svog kraja.
sentences.translationEn: The guest brought sweets from her country for the family.

sentences.translation: Slatkiši su bili sa medom i orašastim plodovima.
sentences.translationEn: The sweets were with honey and nuts.

sentences.translation: Djeca su ih jela i jako ih zavoljela.
sentences.translationEn: The children ate from them and loved them a lot.

sentences.translation: Majka je zahvalila gošći za njezin poklon.
sentences.translationEn: The mother thanked the guest for her gift.
